title: Happy Axolotls
description: Axolotls, but happy! Makes axolotls CUTER!
body:
Ever wanted axolotls to look a bit more, well, happy? Well then Happy Axolotls is the pack for you!

This simple pack adds a cute smile to every axolotl variant!

While being made to match the vanilla style, Happy Axolotls takes the already cute axolotl we all know and love and makes it EVEN CUTER!

NOTE: If you see an incompatible pack error on the newest version, just ignore it. This pack should work on versions 1.21.8 - 1.21.10.
